words.meaning_en: A large natural stream of water flowing to the sea
words.example_sentence: Children swam in the river.

words.meaning_en: A very high area of land with steep sides
words.example_sentence: We could see snow on the mountain top.

words.meaning_en: A large area covered with trees
words.example_sentence: The deer ran into the forest.

words.meaning_en: The colorful part of a plant that blooms
words.example_sentence: She picked a flower from the garden.

words.meaning_en: A tall plant with a trunk, branches, and leaves
words.example_sentence: The bird sat on the top branch of the tree.

words.meaning_en: A flat green part of a plant that grows from a branch
words.example_sentence: A dry leaf fell from the tree.

words.meaning_en: A small part of a plant that can grow into a new plant
words.example_sentence: She planted a seed in the pot.

words.meaning_en: The top layer of earth in which plants grow
words.example_sentence: The farmer dug the soil before planting.

words.meaning_en: A large area of water surrounded by land
words.example_sentence: Ducks swam on the lake.

words.meaning_en: An area of sand or stones next to the sea
words.example_sentence: We collected shells on the beach.

words.meaning_en: Bright points of light seen in the sky at night
words.example_sentence: On a clear night, you can see thousands of stars.

words.meaning_en: The natural satellite of Earth that shines at night
words.example_sentence: The full moon looked beautiful.

words.meaning_en: A mountain that can eject hot lava and gases
words.example_sentence: The volcano erupted last night.

words.meaning_en: Water falling from a height over a cliff
words.example_sentence: The waterfall was very tall and beautiful.

words.meaning_en: A dense tropical forest with thick vegetation
words.example_sentence: Lions and tigers live in the jungle.

words.meaning_en: A hollow space inside a rock or hill
words.example_sentence: Bats live inside the dark cave.

words.meaning_en: A steep rocky face of a hill or mountain

words.example_sentence: Cows grazed peacefully in the green meadow.

words.meaning_en: The line where the sky seems to meet the earth

words.example_sentence: Glaciers are melting because of global warming.

words.meaning_en: A small plant with many thin branches
words.example_sentence: A rabbit hid behind the bush.

words.meaning_en: A low area of land between hills or mountains
